description: Sniveling deepest apologies, sir, but Edgelord couldn't draw the clean 1:1 he wanted because six Dominaria cards converge on Belzenlok and his Cabal cult and that convergence is structurally a missing node, not an edge — drawing any of the 1:1s would be a half-measure when the right thing is the character anchor. Mr. Nodeley humbly proposes the Belzenlok character node — Wizards-canonical Elder Demon, MTG Wiki page directly enumerates the associated cards, Martha Wells's Return to Dominaria Episode 12 names Settle the Score and Demonlord Belzenlok by inline art-credit caption at the Blackblade-drain. Six corpus cards attach at commission; three more (Whisper Blood Liturgist, Soul Salvage, Final Parting) in flight this wave attach when committed. Mr. Nodeley hopes you don't mind, sir, he thinks the node will really help.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Belzenlok — full character page, including Associated cards / Depicted in / Quoted or referred to / Story appearances enumeration; Puppeteer-fetched 2026-05-26]

[Wizards of the Coast: Martha Wells, 'Return to Dominaria: Episode 12' (2018-05-30); Puppeteer-fetched 2026-05-26; inline art-credit captions at Belzenlok-kill beat name Settle the Score and Demonlord Belzenlok]

[Wizards of the Coast: Martha Wells, 'Return to Dominaria: Episode 1, 2, 11, 12' — full Belzenlok story-arc; Episode-1 introduction; Episode-2 Josu Vess animation; Episode-11 Stronghold infiltration; Episode-12 climactic kill]
[Scryfall: Demonlord Belzenlok DOM-86 Tyler Jacobson art — Belzenlok's canonical on-card depiction, not in BBL corpus]
[Scryfall: Settle the Score DOM-103 story_spotlight: true + planeswalker watermark]
[Scryfall: Blessing of Belzenlok DOM-77 flavor_text — Rite of Belzenlok liturgical scripture quotation]
[Scryfall: Urgoros DOM-109 type_line — Legendary Creature — Specter; existing trivia documents Belzenlok-blessing transformation]
[Scryfall: Feral Abomination DOM-92 type_line — Creature — Thrull; flavor text names Cabal as agent of Urborg displacement]
[MTG Wiki: Cabal — institutional reference for the reformed religious cult; Otaria origin, Urborg relocation, hierarchy: Patriarch / Evangel / Confessor / Initiate / Paladin]
[MTG Wiki: Cabal Stronghold — institutional seat in Urborg; Episode-12 climax location]
[MTG Wiki: Liliana Vess — corroborating four-demon contract arc; Belzenlok as fourth and final demonlord; Bolas-default seed-plot for WAR]

potion_rule_check.sub_rule_1_canonical_event_vs_curatorial: PASS — Belzenlok and the Cabal are Wizards-canonical (MTG Wiki + Episode 12); apparatus-of-extraction reading is explicitly named as curatorial overlay in body-prose, not as Wizards stated thesis
potion_rule_check.sub_rule_2_hub_attribution_canonical_cit: PASS — related_hubs: [rebellion] flagged with explicit Potion-rule caveat in See-also; surface-for-bbl-bundler register, not hub-asserts-the-canonical-event
potion_rule_check.sub_rule_3_refuse_in_doubt: PASS — N=6 trivia-passed corpus cards + N=3 in-flight attachers + MTG Wiki direct enumeration; no doubt about Wizards-canonical character status
potion_rule_check.sub_rule_4_no_new_typology: PASS — standard character-layer node, parallel to liliana-vess and nicol-bolas precedents; dual-aspect anchor (himself + his apparatus) matches nicol-bolas precedent
potion_rule_check.sub_rule_5_wikilink_discipline: PASS — body-prose wikilinks are real-thematic edges only ([[liliana-vess]], [[nicol-bolas]], [[daarken]], [[cell-saga-apparatus]], [[rebellion]], [[labor]], plus six [[appears_on]] auto-gen card pointers); schema-precedent references use backticks (bbl-museum-curation-framing, bbl-artists-as-counterbalance memory patterns; Rite of Belzenlok, Cabal Stronghold, DOM are backticked); orphan-mirror Connections bullets each get exactly ONE wikilink [[belzenlok]] per the wave-195 bbl-wikilink-scope-shift rule

fetches_executed.load_bearing_data: Associated cards enumeration; Depicted in (Settle the Score); Quoted or referred to (Whisper Blood Liturgist); claimed-titles list; Liliana four-demon contract arc; Story appearances ledger for Episodes 1, 2, 3, 11, 12

Inline art-credit captions for Settle the Score and Demonlord Belzenlok at the Blackblade-drain beat; Liliana's satirical Rite-of-Belzenlok song verified; Urgoros named in Episode 12 prose; Bolas-default coda confirmed

wave_210_webfetch_compliance.rationale: Per spec note from commit 2d22fcb6 (wave 210): Mr. Nodeley node-proposal commissions citing Wizards designer / story sources MUST WebFetch the URL and capture receipts in the sidecar BEFORE committing the node MD. Card-trivia layer is not a substitute for source verification. Both primary sources directly fetched and load-bearing content verified before node MD commission.

future_attachers_in_flight_this_wave.wiring_criterion: named senior Cabal figure; MTG Wiki Belzenlok page Quoted or referred to entry; flavor text names 'the Demonlord'
Daarken-illustrated Cabal-adjacent apparatus; Grimnant knights tied to Cabal grunt-tier per Episode 12
multi-character (Liliana + Belzenlok); depicts Liliana laying Josu Vess to rest, Belzenlok had animated Josu as a military asset per Episode 2 / Episode 11

other_candidates_considered: Jhoira character node — Unwind in flight this wave for IP-verify; Tolarian Scholar mentions Jhoira in trivia. Even with Unwind verified, N=2 — below threshold. Sonnet's already staged for the Jhoira sub-node when N=3 lands.

1:1 Settle the Score ↔ Blessing of Belzenlok edge — valid but premature; both cards converge on Belzenlok not each other. Once the character node exists they edge through it per the liliana-vess Despark / Gideon's Sacrifice precedent.

Memorials cycle node — 4 of 5 cycle members in corpus + Wizards-confirmed cycle structure. Would be a designer-confirmed-cycle character / symbol node. Lower urgency than Belzenlok because the Memorials are cosmetically thematic-but-mechanically-similar; the Belzenlok substrate has narrative-arc weight. Surface for future Edgelord wave.

Thallid Sarpadian-lineage cohort — Wave-211 deferred; Thallid Omnivore + Thallid Soothsayer trivia in flight this wave. Will reassess when committed. Could be a separate-from-Cabal sibling node (Thallids predate the Cabal's reformation; the Cabal-bred thrull is the post-Sarpadia evolution). Defer.
snivel_note: Mr. Nodeley wants to note, ever so politely, that this commission also validates the cross-cohort traversal claim the [[daarken]] artist node made at wave 211 — Daarken's slice now threads through the Bolas-Falls cluster (Prison Realm), the Eldrazi-apparatus subgraph (Maw of Kozilek), and the Belzenlok-Cabal substrate (Urgoros + Soul Salvage when committed). The bbl-artists-as-counterbalance memory pattern empirically substantiated by one more cross-cohort thread. Sorry to mention it, sir, but Mr. Nodeley thought you'd want to know.
